hyperedges.label: Two equivalent characterizations of NP: certificate/verifier and NTM
Cook-Levin proof pipeline: oblivious MT + mini-configurations + CNF encoding → SAT NP-hard
Core NP-complete problems related by polynomial reductions: SAT, 3SAT, INDSET
Prueba Cook-Levin: mini-configuraciones + oblivious TM + CNF → SAT es NP-hard
Equivalencia definición NP: verificador polinomial ↔ NDTime(n^c) ↔ árbol de cómputos
Jerarquía determinística: o-chica + re-codificación + diagonalización → DTime(f) ⊊ DTime(g)
